ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earthquake_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earthquake event */,
  "rup_mag" REAL /* Magnitude of the rupture */,
  "rup_dip" REAL /* Dip angle of the rupture */,
  "rup_rake" REAL /* Rake angle of the rupture */,
  "rup_ztor" REAL /* Depth to the top of the rupture */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of seismic event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the earthquake */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquake_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance measurement */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "dist_rrup" REAL /* Distance to the rupture in RRUP */,
  "dist_rjb" REAL /* Distance to the rupture in RJB */,
  "dist_rx" REAL /* Distance to the rupture in RX */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "distance_rhypo" REAL /* Distance to the hypocenter */,
  "distance_repi" REAL /* Distance to the epicenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_vs30" REAL /* Vs30 value of the site */,
  "site_vs30measured" REAL /* Measured Vs30 value of the site */,
  "site_z1pt0" REAL /* Depth to the Z1.0 layer at the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location description */,
  "site_owner" TEXT /* Organization or individual responsible for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_types" (
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result type */,
  "result_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the result type (e.g., INTER_EVENT_STDDEV) */,
  "result_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damping_ratios" (
  "damping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damping ratio entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "damping" REAL /* Damping ratio value */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis */,
  "damping_type" TEXT /* Type of damping (e.g., viscous, structural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damping_ratios_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damping_ratios_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pga_results" (
  "pga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PGA result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "pga" REAL /* Peak ground acceleration value */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "pga_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for PGA (e.g., g, m/s²) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pga_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pga_results_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency response entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "damping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the damping ratio */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency value */,
  "value" REAL /* Frequency response value */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "response_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the response value (e.g., dB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_responses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_responses_damping_id FOREIGN KEY ("damping_id") REFERENCES damping_ratios ("damping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_responses_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_by" TEXT /* User who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_result_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_type_id") REFERENCES result_types ("result_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake event */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic event type (e.g., earthquake, aftershock) */,
  "event_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
